lines.speaker: Gerardus
lines.text: Hello there. I am Gerardus, master cartographer. Do you have any charts of the ocean you would be willing to share with me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, have a look at my charts...

lines.speaker: Gerardus
lines.text: You... don't appear to have any with you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, let me go and fetch my captain's log.

lines.speaker: Gerardus
lines.text: Yes, these are some fantastic charts! Please, accept these...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: ... What am I meant to do with these?

lines.speaker: Gerardus
lines.text: I'm not sure, but you seem like a smart person. I'm sure you'll figure something out.

lines.speaker: Gerardus
lines.text: Hmm... these are indeed nice charts, but I'm afraid you've shown me all of these already.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any spare trinkets?

lines.speaker: Gerardus
lines.text: Well, I do have plenty of trinkets, but I suspect you've gotten all the use out of anything I could give you.

lines.speaker: Gerardus
lines.text: Well, over the years, while out mapping the world, I have amassed a collection of.... rare and valuable items.

lines.speaker: Gerardus
lines.text: My maps are now only a few seas from completion. If you're able to help me, I will make sure you are well rewarded for your troubles. So, what do you say?
